name: Curried Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except chicken; mix well.
2. Place chicken in a shallow glass dish.
3. Pour 1/2 cup yogurt mixture over chicken; turn to coat both sides.
4. Cover and marinate in refrigerator for at least 3 hours or overnight.
5. Cover and refrigerate the remaining yogurt mixture separately.
6. Preheat broiler.
7. Broil chicken 3-4 inches from heat source, about 5-6 minutes per side.
8. Heat reserved yogurt sauce over low heat until warm; do not boil.
9. Serve with chicken.
4 servings.
